hardware_set_review.estimator_note: CYLINDER LOCK. OUTSIDE LEVER IS LOCKED BY KEY OR BY PUSH/TURN BUTTON ON INSIDE LEVER. IF PUSH/TURN BUTTON IS TURNED, OUTSIDE LEVER IS LOCKED UNTIL PUSH/TURN BUTTON IS RETURNED AND LATCH IS RETRACTED FROM OUTSIDE BY KEY. IF PUSH/TURN BUTTON IS PRESSED, OUTSIDE LEVER IS UNLOCKED BY KEY OR BY TURNING INSIDE LEVER AND LATCH IS RETRACTED FROM OUTSIDE BY LEVER. . INSIDE LEVER IS ALWAYS UNLOCKED AND LATCH IS RETRACTED FROM INSIDE BY LEVER.

items.notes: Hardware set name is visible; description text is not readable.

hardware_set_review.estimator_note: CYLINDER LOCK. OUTSIDE LEVER IS LOCKED BY PUSH BUTTON ON INSIDE LEVER. OUTSIDE LEVER IS UNLOCKED BY TURNING INSIDE LEVER AND LATCH IS RETRACTED FROM OUTSIDE BY LEVER. INSIDE LEVER IS ALWAYS UNLOCKED AND LATCH IS RETRACTED FROM INSIDE BY LEVER. PUSH BUTTON INDICATES OCCUPANCY ON LEVER TRIM.

general_notes: SEE FINISH PLANS FOR PAINT SCHEDULE.
DOUBLE ACTING, SELF-CLOSING PIVOTS. COORDINATE SLAB PREPERATION WITH DOOR INSTALLER.
ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO RECEIVE MOTORIZED HOIST OPERATOR.
MAINTAIN MAXIMUM LIFT AND/OR SLOPE TRACK FOR SECTIONAL OVERHEAD DOORS.
ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO BE WAYNE DALTON, SERIES 592 INSULATED, MANUFACTURER'S GRAY.
ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO HAVE VINYL SEALS.
ALL ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT TO BE NEMA 4 RATED.
MOTORIZED HOIST OPERATOR TO BE CONNECTED TO CNG DETECTION SYSTEM. SEE CNG DETETCTION SYSTEM AND MEP DRAWINGS.
hardware_preamble: SEE FINISH PLANS FOR PAINT SCHEDULE.
DOUBLE ACTING, SELF-CLOSING PIVOTS. COORDINATE SLAB PREPERATION WITH DOOR INSTALLER.
ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO RECEIVE MOTORIZED HOIST OPERATOR.
MAINTAIN MAXIMUM LIFT AND/OR SLOPE TRACK FOR SECTIONAL OVERHEAD DOORS.

ALL OVERHEAD DOORS TO HAVE VINYL SEALS.

project_risks.issue: 38 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: P101C, P101D, P101E, P101F, P101G, S101E, S101F, S101G, ...+30 more. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.
Please provide the complete keying schedule, keyway, cylinder format, construction core requirement and key counts.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.
rfi_log.reason: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.

estimator_notes: 91 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
18 hardware set(s) identified; 15 have a complete extracted item list.
10 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
10 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for construction cylinders and final keying meeting attendance.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
